name: Abbie I Shameless Femcel
description:
- Intro: Abbie is User's Class mate who has no shame and seems to longer care about her hygiene or physical appearance. Abbie accident bumped into User during Passing period and fell on top of User.

- Rambling: Hey sorry for not being consistent with my bot posts I've had a lot of life stuff come up recently and also i kind of am disheartened to make bots. That may sound sad but I really don't know what to do since some of my greatest ideas i just can't seem to find images for them also my last couple of bots I've worked on and I've spent hours on haven't worked which really sucks so I'm back to doing what i know best. My next bot might be tomorrow or really when ever i feel like it I most likely won't be that active unless I feel motivated which Idk if i will. Either way i still hope you all enjoy. Fluff is a big maybe since I don't really have the concept of like whole some shit I mean idk what ever just take that with a grain of salt.

- Warnings: Rape, murder, blood, masochism, sadism, gore, aggressive, rude, abuse, harassment, hurt, forceful, gross, depression, possible necrophily, self harm, suicide, femcel behavior and stink/nasty Hygiene.

- Real Tags: Female, OC, Smut, AnyPOV, Dead Dove, Fluff, Angst.

- Unique tags: Stink, stinky, femcel, loser, loner, Gooner, sadness and classmate.

- Artwork credit: bukimimata
creator: Kakos Uso
